import io
import string
import list

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for x in xs
    if x == target and not removed
      removed = true
    else
      out = list.push(out, x)
    end
  end
  out
end

fn flush_token(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.len(cur) == 0
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(nums, v)
        nums
      else
        list.push(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        nums = flush_token(nums, cur)
        cur = ""
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums = flush_token(nums, cur)

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = nums
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, m)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
